What We Do

Services Built for Real Growth

Every service is engineered to move the needle — measurable outcomes, not vanity metrics.

01

Social Media Marketing

Platform-native content strategies that build community, drive engagement, and convert followers into loyal customers across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook & more.

Learn more
02

SEO Optimization

Technical SEO, content optimization, and authority building that puts your brand at the top of Google — and keeps it there for the long haul.

Learn more
03

Paid Ads Management

High-ROI campaigns across Meta, Google, and YouTube. We write copy, design creatives, and optimise relentlessly until every rupee works harder.

Learn more
04

Website Development

Fast, conversion-optimised websites that look world-class and rank on Google. Built on modern stacks, designed for humans, engineered for search engines.

Learn more
05

Brand Growth Strategy

Full-funnel brand strategy that aligns your identity, messaging, audience targeting, and growth levers into a cohesive playbook for sustainable scale.

Learn more
06

Content & Email Marketing

Compelling content that educates, entertains, and converts. From blog posts to email sequences — narratives that build trust and drive revenue at scale.

Learn more

Who We Are

We're Not an Agency.
We're a Growth Partner.

DevVriksha is a modern digital marketing agency built for brands that are serious about growth. We operate at the intersection of strategy, creativity, and data — building marketing systems that generate real, compounding results.

Founded in 2023, we've helped 40+ brands across India break through the noise and establish dominant digital presences. Our approach: understand your audience deeply, craft compelling narratives, and distribute them through channels that convert.

We don't do vanity metrics. We do revenue, reach, and return. Every campaign is tied to business outcomes, every decision is backed by data.

Data-Driven Strategy
Full-Funnel Execution
Transparent Reporting
ROI-Focused
Dedicated Account Team
Our Founders

The Minds Behind It

Two founders. One mission. Building a generation of unstoppable digital brands.

VS
Vishal Shukla
Co-Founder & CEO

Vishal is the strategic engine of DevVriksha. With a sharp eye for brand positioning and performance marketing, he has led 40+ digital growth campaigns across diverse industries. His vision: make world-class marketing accessible to every ambitious brand. He brings data intelligence and creative storytelling together to build loyal communities — not just audiences.

DA
Divyanshu Aswal
Co-Founder & CMO

Divyanshu is the creative powerhouse behind DevVriksha's brand narratives. He specialises in social media strategy, content ecosystems, and paid media — turning budgets into brand equity. Passionate about the intersection of psychology and marketing, he ensures every campaign resonates deeply and delivers measurable, scalable results that move businesses forward.
